espacosPublicos.title: Public space maintenance
espacosPublicos.desc: Incidents, infrastructure, urban hygiene and operations centre.

mobilidade.title: Mobility
mobilidade.desc: Public space, enforcement, transport and integrations such as Waze.

turismo.title: Tourism
turismo.desc: Events and services linked to the territory.

ambiente.title: Environment and sustainability
ambiente.desc: Environmental data and support for territorial decisions.

ocorrencias.title: Incident management
ocorrencias.desc: Prioritised requests tracked to closure — citizens informed and teams with visible SLAs.

urbanistica.title: Urban development management
urbanistica.desc: Constraints and instruments on the map — technical decisions with context, less rework across departments.

transito.title: Traffic restrictions management
transito.desc: Closures and diversions on the map with immediate communication — less friction for road users and operators.

higiene.title: Urban hygiene
higiene.desc: Coordinated routes and work orders — more coverage with teams aligned on the map.

appbuilder.title: AppBuilder
appbuilder.desc: Forms and apps tailored to municipal processes — evolution without long development cycles.

mapify.title: Mapify
mapify.desc: Sensors and rules in one layer — alerts and automation before incidents escalate.

contact.ctaTitle: Let's align the platform with your context
contact.ctaLead: Send us a message and we will arrange a demo focused on your municipality's priorities.

footer.intro: City as a Platform is a Focus BC product — an operational platform for municipalities and public bodies.
